subcodes.first_line: We have adorned the Books of Heaven with this Book, which hath shone forth from the Sun of thy Lord's Revelation, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise, and We have made it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد زینا کتب السماء بهذا الکتاب الذی اشرق من شمس وحی ربک العلیم الحکیم و جعلناه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @naming of children; of individuals
